section.title: Introduction
section.para: A glossary maps surface forms, including multiword terms, to stable identifiers. The package opennlp.tools.glossary compiles a list of GlossaryEntry values into an AhoCorasickGlossaryMatcher and mounts that matcher on the document pipeline through GlossaryAnnotator. Every hit is a span over the original text, so consumers read identifiers and covered text without re-tokenizing.

section.title: Matching through a pipeline
